Here's a paragraph about Evodia rutaecarpa:

 Evodia rutaecarpa, also known as Evodia cuneata, is a plant species native to East Asia, known for its medicinal properties and traditional use in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Evodia rutaecarpa include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anti-cancer properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Evodia rutaecarpa include evodiamine, rutaecarpine, and rutaevine, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Evodia rutaecarpa include dried fruit extracts, capsules, and teas, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
